CAPABILITIES

Core Features & Solutions

🏢

Custom ERP/CRM

Stop forcing your business into rigid SaaS tools. We build systems that match your exact operational workflows.

💡 Strategic Insight

Off-the-shelf ERPs charge per-seat licenses that scale linearly with headcount. Custom-built platforms have zero marginal cost — your 500th user costs the same as your 5th.

Oracle NetSuite
SAP
Odoo
Python
PostgreSQL
🔗

API Integrations

Connecting legacy systems with modern cloud infrastructure to eliminate manual data entry and silos.

💡 Strategic Insight

Every API integration you build is a moat. The more deeply your systems talk to each other, the harder it is for competitors to replicate your operational efficiency.

Node.js
GraphQL
FastAPI
Python
Redis
👥

Role-Based Access

Complex organizational hierarchies, permission sets, and audit logs built-in from day one.

💡 Strategic Insight

The average enterprise loses 30% of revenue to unauthorized access and data leaks. RBAC isn't a feature — it's a business survival mechanism.

Node.js
PostgreSQL
Redis
AWS
Python
🔗

Seamless API Integrations

Connect your legacy on-premise systems with modern cloud APIs without disruption.

💡 Strategic Insight

Legacy integration failures cost enterprises $500B annually. Purpose-built API layers eliminate data silos and give every team a single source of truth.

GraphQL
Node.js
Python
FastAPI
AWS
📊

Custom CRM Solutions

Purpose-built customer relationship management systems with pipeline tracking, automated follow-ups, and 360° customer views tailored to your sales process.

💡 Strategic Insight

A CRM your sales team actually uses is worth 10x one they work around. Custom CRM fits YOUR sales process, not the other way around.

Salesforce
Zoho CRM
Microsoft Dynamics 365
Node.js
PostgreSQL
💵

Billing & Invoicing Software

Automated billing engines with recurring invoicing, tax calculation, multi-currency support, and integration with accounting platforms like Tally and QuickBooks.

💡 Strategic Insight

Manual invoicing at scale is a ticking time bomb. Automated billing with payment gateway integration eliminates errors and accelerates cash flow by 40%.

Stripe
Razorpay
Node.js
PostgreSQL
React
📈

Real-Time Dashboards

Live operational dashboards with KPI tracking, drill-down reports, and automated alerting for inventory, sales, and financial metrics.

💡 Strategic Insight

Real-time dashboards replace the monthly report cycle. When leadership sees live metrics, decisions happen in hours instead of weeks.

Power BI
Grafana
React
Node.js
PostgreSQL

THE ENTERPRISE ADVANTAGE

Why you need custom platforms (and why you don't)

Eliminate Per-Seat Licensing

SAP, Salesforce, and Dynamics charge $50-300/user/month. Custom platforms cost the same whether you have 10 users or 10,000.

Your Workflow, Not Theirs

Stop bending your processes to fit generic software. Custom platforms mirror YOUR operations — onboarding takes hours, not months.

Unified Data Layer

One platform connecting sales, operations, finance, and HR. No more exporting CSVs between 5 different tools.

Competitive Moat

Your custom platform encodes your unique operational knowledge. Competitors can copy your product — they can't copy your internal systems.

When NOT to Build Custom

If you're under 20 employees and your processes aren't standardized yet, start with off-the-shelf. Build custom when generic tools actively slow you down.

Avoid Feature Bloat

Build for the 80% of workflows your team uses daily. The other 20% can be added iteratively based on real usage data.

OUR PLATFORM APPROACH

Engineering your enterprise

Process Mapping First

We spend 2 weeks mapping your actual workflows — not what your team says they do, but what they actually do — before designing anything.

Modular Architecture

Every module (CRM, billing, HRMS) is independently deployable. Start with what you need, add modules as you grow.

Migration Expertise

We've migrated 10TB+ of data from legacy systems. Your data transfers cleanly with zero downtime and full validation.

Role-Based Security

Granular access controls, audit logging, and SOC 2 compliance baked into every platform from the architecture layer.

Founder-Led Consulting

Our enterprise architects work directly with your C-suite to align platform design with business strategy.

Ongoing Evolution

Platforms aren't static. Monthly sprints add features based on user feedback and business metric tracking.

USE CASES

Built for operational complexity

Manufacturing & Supply Chain

Production planning, inventory management, vendor portals, and quality control with real-time tracking.

Financial Services

Loan management, customer onboarding, compliance tracking, and automated regulatory reporting.

Healthcare Networks

Multi-clinic management, patient CRM, insurance billing, and HIPAA-compliant data handling.

Real Estate & Construction

Project management, contractor billing, lead tracking, and multi-site portfolio dashboards.

Education & Training

Student management, fee collection, course scheduling, and multi-campus administration platforms.

Logistics & Distribution

Fleet management, route optimization, warehouse operations, and last-mile delivery tracking.

THE METHODOLOGY

How We Deliver Quality

01. Process Mapping

We spend time with your stakeholders to map out every single operational workflow and bottleneck.

02. Modular Build

We develop the platform in modules (e.g., HR, Sales, Inventory) so you can start using it faster.

03. Data Migration & Training

We migrate your historical data from legacy systems and train your staff on the new platform.

QUESTIONS & ANSWERS

Frequently Asked Questions

Core MVP takes 8-12 weeks. Full enterprise platforms with integrations and data migration take 4-6 months. We deliver in phases — your team starts using Module 1 while we build Module 2.

Yes. We build API layers that connect with any existing tool — Tally, SAP, QuickBooks, Salesforce, Google Workspace, or custom legacy databases. No data silos.

We handle full data migration with validation, deduplication, and cleanup. We run parallel systems during transition so there's zero business disruption.

Ready to replace the spreadsheets and shadow IT?

Book a scoping call. We'll map your current systems and propose an architecture that scales with your operations, not against them.
